task_name: Please go over and take the toilet paper from the trash can next to the toilet and place it on the counter top
instruction: I accidentally threw the paper into the trash can next to the toilet. Could you go over, take it out, and place it on the counter top for me?
target_description: I accidentally threw the paper into the trash can next to the toilet. Could you go over, take it out, and place it on the counter top for me?
